title: lappula mexicana
intro: Lappula mexicana, also known as the Mexican stickseed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. Lappula mexicana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
